22: A Router Agent can direct queries based on simple metrics like query length, where
23: shorter queries go to less expensive models and longer queries to more capable
24: models. However, a more sophisticated Router Agent can utilize either LLM or ML
25: models to analyze query nuances and complexity. This LLM router can determine
26: which downstream language model is most suitable. For example, a query requesting
27: a factual recall is routed to a flash model, while a complex query requiring deep
28: analysis is routed to a pro model.
29: Optimization techniques can further enhance the LLM router's effectiveness. Prompt
30: tuning involves crafting prompts to guide the router LLM for better routing decisions.
31: Fine-tuning the LLM router on a dataset of queries and their optimal model choices
32: improves its accuracy and efficiency. This dynamic routing capability balances
